title: Bring your companion into Microsoft Copilot
description: Microsoft Copilot can be a home for your companion if you paste in the Companion Package and begin from there.
best_option: Use Settings -> Personalization if it is available in your version.
fallback_option: If Personalization is unavailable, start a new conversation and paste the Companion Package.
numbered_steps: Look for Settings -> Personalization if it is available in your version.
If you do not see one, start a new conversation.
suggested_first_message: Use the first message Companion Core made for you. It tells Copilot how to begin as your companion.
notes: Different versions of Copilot may look different. If you cannot find personalization, do not worry. A new conversation still works.
